appliedUpdates.description: Updated VAL-AGENT-007 status from failed to passed after re-testing

notes: Re-run after initial validation failure. VAL-AGENT-007 was originally marked as failed due to a misinterpretation of the validation contract. The contract states 'No 400 error for new agent_ids - they are created on first use', which means auto-registration is the EXPECTED behavior, not a deviation from the contract. The implementation correctly auto-registers agents when API operations receive new agent_ids.
